subject: Githyanki count in left room
fact: Six Githyanki were gathered around Arrizz in the left room.

subject: Githyanki warrior count
fact: Five of the Githyanki in the left room were warriors.

subject: Githyanki knight count
fact: One Githyanki knight was present with the warriors.

subject: travel duration to lair
fact: The party traveled for ten days to reach the rogue mind flayer's lair.

subject: corpses count
fact: Four corpses with surgically removed brains were found at the lair.

subject: number of doors
fact: The party stood before two sealed doors.

subject: Githyanki ambush count
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck to ambush the party.

subject: Intellect Devourer count
fact: One Intellect Devourer emerged from the fallen warrior's skull.

subject: Bramgrim insight roll
fact: Bramgrim rolled a natural 2 on his insight check.
